title: ClaudeKit Skill Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter validation

description.description: Human-readable capability description for the skill

when_to_use.description: Additional invocation context. ClaudeKit caps the combined description and when_to_use listing text through inventory checks.

user-invocable.description: Shipped ClaudeKit skills must remain user-invocable. Control listing pressure with settings and bounded descriptions, not hidden skills.

disable-model-invocation.description: Shipped ClaudeKit skills must remain agent-invocable. Omit this field or set it to false.

argument-hint.description: Short hint shown to the user about what argument the skill accepts

arguments.description: Named positional arguments for skill invocation

license.description: SPDX license identifier or license name

languages.description: Comma-separated list of programming languages supported

allowed-tools.description: Comma-separated list of Claude tools the skill is allowed to use

model.description: Optional Claude Code model override for the skill

effort.description: Optional Claude Code reasoning effort override for the skill

context.description: Optional Claude Code execution context for the skill

agent.description: Optional Claude Code subagent used to execute the skill

shell.description: Optional shell hint for command-oriented skills

paths.description: Optional path hints for skills that target specific files

hooks.description: Optional hook metadata for skills that integrate with Claude Code hooks

requires.description: Skill names this skill depends on (must be installed)

related.description: Related skill names (informational, no hard dependency)

author.description: Author or maintainer of the skill

attribution.description: Attribution for third-party content or inspiration

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata block for author, version, attribution, etc.
